name: Eggnog Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300°F. Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
To prepare the crust, combine graham cracker crumbs and margarine. Press into the bottom of the prepared pan.
To prepare the filling, combine cream cheese, milk, egg white, rum extract, and nutmeg. Pour into the crust.
Bake for 40 minutes or until lightly browned.
